note: $1.3B/yr in military aid since 1979 Camp David Accords. Total since 1948: $85B+. Aid continued through military coups (2013) and mass killings of protesters. Egypt uses US-supplied weapons to maintain authoritarian control.
controversies: Military coup in 2013 killed 1,000+ protesters. US aid continued despite legal requirements to cut it. Sisi jails journalists, activists.
